overall.description: Slow first-person exploration through a dimly lit corridor in an old wooden house, with dramatic golden-hour backlighting streaming through windows. The camera moves steadily forward before turning toward a glass-paneled exit door, revealing worn carpets and vintage furnishings in high-fidelity game engine footage.

scene_state.functional_zone: old house corridor with vintage furnishings

agents.ego_description: slowly walking down the dim corridor, observing the worn wooden interior and patterned carpet

entered.detail: tall window with tattered lace curtains allowing golden light to filter through
bright window at the end of the corridor illuminating the distant wall
dark wooden cabinet or wardrobe against the far wall beneath the window
ornate patterned carpet covering the corridor floor with red and gold tones
wooden door with multiple glass panels allowing bright light to stream through

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow, dimly lit corridor of an old house. Golden afternoon light filters through a tall window with tattered lace curtains on the left, while a brighter window glows at the far end of the hall. The camera moves slowly forward over an ornate patterned carpet, passing a dark wooden wardrobe, with a glass-paneled door visible on the right side.

events.description: camera begins turning right toward the glass-paneled door while continuing forward

agents.ego_description: turning toward the bright glass door on the right while continuing to walk forward

segments.scene_description: As the camera continues down the corridor, it gradually turns right toward the glass-paneled door. The far window moves out of view as the focus shifts to the bright light streaming through the door's glass panels. The wooden wardrobe and left window recede into the background while the camera approaches the exit door, ending with a close view of the illuminated door frame.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dimly lit wooden corridor that shifts from a linear path toward a bright, glass-paneled exit. It begins by gliding forward over an ornate patterned carpet, passing a dark wooden wardrobe while golden afternoon light filters through tattered lace curtains on the left. As the camera advances, the glow from a distant window at the end of the hall guides the movement before the perspective gradually pivots to the right. The scene then shifts focus away from the receding hallway and left-side window, drawing closer to the intense light streaming through the glass panels of the door. The movement finally culminates in a close view of the illuminated door frame as the rest of the corridor fades into the background.
